description_long: This object is a modern cash register with a robust, angular design, primarily finished in matte black. The front features a recessed workspace with a raised section housing a digital display screen, which appears to be an LCD with a metallic bezel. The workspace includes a control panel with several buttons and a possible card reader slot, though the keypad is not clearly visible. The sides and back are solid and blocky, giving the register a secure, tamper-resistant appearance. The overall construction suggests a heavy-duty build, likely intended for high-traffic urban environments such as retail stores or kiosks. The surface is mostly smooth with subtle metallic accents, and the object appears capable of supporting additional items on its flat top.
description: A robust, matte black cash register with a digital display and a recessed workspace, featuring a heavy-duty, angular design and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display screen, recessed workspace, and control panel area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, solid side panel and partial view of the display's rear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, blocky back with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the sturdy side panel and rear of the display.
